mapper.select: SELECT vb.id, vb.name, vb.description, COUNT(vw.id) AS total_words FROM vocabulary_book vb LEFT JOIN vocabulary_word vw ON vw.book_id = vb.id AND vw.status = 1 WHERE vb.active = 1 GROUP BY vb.id, vb.name, vb.description, vb.sort_order ORDER BY vb.sort_order ASC, vb.id ASC

SELECT vb.id, vb.name, vb.description, COUNT(vw.id) AS total_words FROM vocabulary_book vb LEFT JOIN vocabulary_word vw ON vw.book_id = vb.id AND vw.status = 1 WHERE vb.id = #{id} GROUP BY vb.id, vb.name, vb.description
